name: PartySticks Glow Sticks Party Supplies 100pk - 8 Inch Glow in the Dark Light Up Sticks Party Favors, Glow Party Decorations, Neon Party Glow Necklaces and Glow Bracelets with Connectors
bullets: 100 Glow Sticks Party Pack: Light up with 100 pieces of easy-to-activate and vibrant multi-colored light sticks plus 100 pieces of dependable connectors that stay put for hours
Waterproof Glow Sticks: Use these glow in the dark party favors as glow party decorations or use in the pool or during bathtime; these waterproof glow party supplies are non leaking and nontoxic
Longer Lasting Glow Party Supplies: To activate these glow in the dark light sticks, simply snap and shake until completely lit; these 8-inch long glow in the dark sticks glow bright for 10-14 hours
Kid-Safe and Quality Assured: These nontoxic and non leaking glow in the dark party favors are safe and fun for kids

Perfect for Every Holiday Celebration – Our ultra-bright glow sticks light up the night for Halloween, New Year’s, Easter, or the Fourth of July, and are just as fun for birthdays, weddings, pool parties, and more.

reviews.name: Ashley
reviews.title: Perfect for our classroom glow party
reviews.body: These glow sticks were perfect for our class glow party! They were bright, colorful, and super easy to activate, which made them great for a large group of students. The kids were so excited to wear them and use them during games and activities, and they added such a fun, energetic vibe to the classroom. They lasted long enough for the entire event and made the celebration feel extra special and…

reviews.name: Lauri
reviews.title: A Huge Hit at Our Race Event for Kids of ALL Ages!
reviews.body: These glow sticks were one of the most popular items in the kids' gift bags at our annual race event. By the end of the evening, they were everywhere—in the best possible way!The kids turned them into necklaces, bracelets, earrings, and all kinds of creative accessories. Sometimes they were just waving the glowing sticks around as they raced through the stadium. It was so much fun to watch. The…

reviews.name: dewey
reviews.title: Good value glow sticks
reviews.body: great party favors! Kids of all ages love to have these. Very good quality for the money. They are bright and last a long time.

reviews.name: Okay Honey, Yes Dear
reviews.title: Versatile and Fun Glow Sticks for All Occasions
reviews.body: The Glow Sticks Bulk Party Favors 100pk is a fantastic product for various creative and fun uses. These 8-inch glow sticks are perfect for glow-in-the-dark bathtubs, makeshift costumes, Halloween fun, and much more. With vibrant colors and easy assembly into necklaces or bracelets, this pack offers great quality and quantity for the price.The Pros:Vibrant Colors: The glow sticks come in bright…
